description: Perform a regression influence analysis on the 'food.gdt' dataset. Write and execute a hansl script that runs an OLS regression of 'food_exp' on 'income', calculates leverage (hat values) and DFFITS statistics, and prints per-observation results. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/influence_analysis.inp and the output report identifying high leverage observations to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/influence_report.txt.
